title: Resin Cookie
description: A mod that adds Resin Cookies and more...
body:
This mod adds a new item called Resin Cookie!

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b50e6e6940bcc67618205492d831310a39aea1fd.png)

You can also use it to brew a haste potion (Using a **thick potion** instead of an awkward potion potion) and you can make a mining fatigue potion with a fermented spider eye + the haste potion.

![Thick potion + Resin Cookie = Haste potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/531d69a5ece6493ec9af433bb7a631d708edcb62.png)

![Haste potion + Fermented Spider Eye = Mining Fatigue potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb103acf33407ef6a72d5d0431cc91f3a565cd00.png)
